== Notes for [[Item:Q106287|Q106287]] ==

ID: I180889

Name: Abed Abu Farisi al-Hirah 1

Sex: M

Birth: ABT 688 1

Event: Relationship (J,M&L) 42nd Great-grandparent 1

Marriage 1 Zahra' (Zohra) bint Husayn al-Hassan b: ABT 690

Children

Na'im al-Lakhmi b: ABT 710

Sources:

Title: loren.ged

Repository:

Media: Other

Text: Date of Import: Apr 12, 200

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000004533831115

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
